mentions.note: Turnaround story: 137% gain past 12M; six blockbuster drugs in parasiticides, dermatology, pain; number one in US beef, poultry, swine; protein revolution and pet humanization driving mid-single-digit revenue, high single-digit EBITDA, low double-digit EPS growth.
Preferred animal health pick over Zoetis; Cramer favors Jeff Simmons' leadership and growth trajectory.
